name: kaswin
description: Kaswin vNext local-integration candidate for a single-file Kaspa Toccata raffle; network release remains gated.

scripts.compile:contract: node scripts/compile-raffle-contract.mjs raffle_refund_v16 && node scripts/compile-raffle-contract.mjs raffle_round_v16
scripts.compile:vnext: node scripts/compile-raffle-contract.mjs raffle_refund_vnext && node scripts/compile-raffle-contract.mjs raffle_round_vnext
scripts.verify: node scripts/compile-raffle-contract.mjs raffle_refund_vnext && node scripts/compile-raffle-contract.mjs raffle_round_vnext && node scripts/verify-validation-fingerprint.mjs && node scripts/verify-protocol-vnext.mjs && node scripts/verify-vnext-integration.mjs && node scripts/verify-page-state-machine.mjs && node scripts/verify-signing-confirmation.mjs && tsc --noEmit && vite build && node scripts/inline-spa.mjs && node scripts/verify-protocol-release.mjs && node scripts/verify-single-file.mjs && node scripts/verify-covenant-artifact.mjs && node scripts/verify-vnext-artifacts.mjs && node scripts/verify-vnext-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-vnext-close-empty.mjs && node scripts/verify-vnext-mass.mjs && node scripts/verify-chain-randomness.mjs && node scripts/verify-web-requirements.mjs && node scripts/verify-mainnet-readiness.mjs && node scripts/verify-batch-refund-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-million-users.mjs && node scripts/verify-indexer-package.mjs && node scripts/verify-indexer.mjs && node scripts/verify-indexer-vnext.mjs
scripts.verify:covenant: tsc --noEmit && vite build && node scripts/inline-spa.mjs && node scripts/verify-covenant-artifact.mjs && node scripts/verify-chain-randomness.mjs
